steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/, switch to Ethereum chain
Open settings panel, verify local token exists
steps.expected: Local Tokens section shows cUSDC with toggle switch
steps.observed: Local Tokens section shows cUSDC (0x39AA39c021dfbaE8faC545936693aC917d5E7563) on Ethereum, toggle is ON (checked)

steps.action: Close settings, type 'cUSDC' in To Token field with toggle ON
steps.observed: cUSDC (Compound USD Coin, 0x39AA39c021dfbaE8faC545936693aC917d5E7563) appears in autocomplete

steps.action: Open settings, toggle Local Tokens OFF
Close settings, type 'cUSDC' in To Token field with toggle OFF
steps.observed: No autocomplete dropdown appeared — cUSDC not found

steps.action: Open settings, toggle Local Tokens back ON
Close settings, type 'cUSDC' in To Token field with toggle ON again
steps.observed: cUSDC (Compound USD Coin, 0x39AA39c021dfbaE8faC545936693aC917d5E7563) reappears in autocomplete

evidence.network: No relevant network requests for this UI-only toggle test

summary: Tested 1 assertion: VAL-CROSS-003 passed. Local Tokens toggle now works correctly — toggling OFF removes local tokens from autocomplete, toggling ON restores them. Previously reported as failing in round 1 (no toggle existed); the fix (commit 834d5df) adds a functional toggle switch.
